title: facts docs/facts external truth
purpose: E3.1 defines facts docs facts external truth for the agent-driven expert system. Knowledge & composition — catalog, compose-first, staleness.
scope: Owns `E3.1` only; siblings under `E3` must not duplicate this spec.
Aligns with minimal HITL: H1 plan, H2 blocker, H3 sign-off ([INTRO-1.2](INTRO-1.2-human-touchpoint-contract-h1-h2-h3.md)).
Conflicts resolve in favor of [Vision §7 — Branch E — Knowledge & composition plane](../../full-automation-vision-and-hierarchy.md#7-branch-e-knowledge-composition-plane).
behavior_steps: Before spawning implement workers, [Librarian](B2.2-librarian-allowed-reads-catalog-composition.md) returns `allowed_reads` (max five paths) from catalog composition; spawn contracts inject those paths into worker context so pursuit does not improvise scope.
implement-feature workers touch only files listed on the active task card plus `allowed_reads`—opening full design trees or drive-by refactors outside that boundary is scope creep.
On merge, the conductor compares the diff to task card file targets and rejects out-of-scope changes for rework rather than silent acceptance into the goal slice.
A first violation triggers rework with diff evidence attached under `evidence/`; repeated creep on the same task escalates to H2 with structured failure notes per this mistake-class control.
If a worker cannot finish within the card boundary, pursuit fails closed at H2 instead of expanding scope without conductor and operator visibility.

Edge case `E3.1` variant 4: verify state dual-write before continuing pursuit.
Pass 3: add regression test or evidence path specific to `E3.1`.
Pass 3: cross-link related nodes in same branch index.

**False complete:** Item marked done without artifact â†’ audit-hierarchy-depth.py re-enqueues deepen pass.
**Scope bleed:** Worker edits journal/state during planning-only expansion â†’ forbidden in vision-expansion-prompt.
**Stale design:** Upstream vision Â§ changes â†’ reconcile-stale adds deepen items for affected ids.

acceptance: [ ] Named script, skill, or test path exists or is listed in SEC-15 release row
narrative: E3.1 defines facts docs facts external truth for the agent-driven expert system. Knowledge & composition — catalog, compose-first, staleness. In practice, the system before spawning implement workers, [librarian](b2.2-librarian-allowed-reads-catalog-composition.md) returns `allowed_reads` (max five paths) from catalog composition; spawn contracts inject those paths into worker context so pursuit does not improvise scope, then implement-feature workers touch only files listed on the active task card plus `allowed_reads`—opening full design trees or drive-by refactors outside that boundary is scope creep.
reader_narrative:
<!-- prose-source: agent plane-e 2026-06-28 -->

`docs/facts/` holds external truth separate from design and journal narrative: environment URLs, schema snippets, operator-provided credentials pointers, team routing. Agents read facts; they do not invent URLs or API shapes when INDEX lists a topic file.

Facts integrate with compose at lowest rank ([E2.3](E2.3-compose-rank-script-playbook-skill-facts.md)) and with context retrieval ([E1.4](E1.4-catalog-facts-index.md)). Blocking questions about external config resolve by reading or extending facts—not by guessing. Stale facts when upstream systems change should trigger journal note and optional reconcile-stale ([E5.3](E5.3-staleness-reconcile-stale-artifact-graph-skills.md)).
